mnemonics.title: Thread Models
mnemonics.content: MOM (Many-One-Many): Models of Multithreading - Many-to-One, One-to-One, Many-to-Many

acronyms.usage: Thread management in user space without kernel involvement
Thread directly managed by OS scheduler

visualTips.visualization: Imagine 3 lanes (models): 1) Many cars (threads) merging into single tunnel (kernel thread) 2) One car per tunnel 3) Multiple cars sharing multiple tunnels

analogies.analogy: Like taxi stand with waiting cabs - tasks are passengers, threads are drivers ready to serve
